subject: session date
fact: The session is dated June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: Githyanki warriors count
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck to ambush the party.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck

subject: Githyanki warriors count
fact: Four Githyanki warriors were flanking Rogue Thought.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: wine bottles count
fact: Isthana presented Felkur with three bottles of rare wine.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine

subject: brain jars count
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: opals count
fact: The party found two opals while searching the area.
source_quote: finding two opals

subject: Rogue Thought's waiting duration
fact: Rogue Thought declared he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: waiting for them for a very long time

subject: rest duration
fact: The party took a short rest to recover their strength.
source_quote: After a short rest

subject: rest duration
fact: The group took a short rest to recover their strength and heal the Owlbear.
source_quote: The party takes a short rest to recover their strength and heal the Owlbear

subject: travel sequence
fact: Arrizz traveled alongside the party one last time.
source_quote: with Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Graz'zt's revenge vow
fact: Rogue Thought warned that both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: fire giants timeline
fact: Fire giants in Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work

subject: madness containment
fact: The brain-capped mushrooms were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness.
source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

subject: brain fridge contents
fact: A large block of opaque ice contained suspended brains, small vials of yellowish liquid, and strange otherworldly symbols.
source_quote: a large block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains, small vials of yellowish liquid, and strange otherworldly symbols

subject: copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings was found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: chainmail pouch
fact: The party found a chainmail pouch of gold coins.
source_quote: a chainmail pouch of gold coins

subject: circlet
fact: The party found a valuable circlet.
source_quote: a valuable circlet

subject: tentacles collected
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of victory.
source_quote: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: magic gifts
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts.
source_quote: rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts

subject: rod of the pact keeper
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with a rod of the pact keeper.
source_quote: a rod of the pact keeper

subject: wand of the war mage
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with an upgraded wand of the war mage.
source_quote: an upgraded wand of the war mage
